title: Neznámý titulek
content: Enyo Grappling 8 took place on April 4th, 2026 and the main event was a crazy team matchup between two teams that were put together to represent the North and South of England. There were plenty of great battles coming from the juniors at the beginning of the event, followed by a ton of submission finishes on the preliminary card. The highlights here included a rough Ezekiel choke from Becky Mayo and a bow and arrow choke from Jess Hammond, among others. Then the main card was focused primarily on the North vs South match, but it also included a pair of half-time superfights that saw Caroline Kinnane locking up a bow and arrow choke and Josefine Modig putting on a phenomenal display that ended in an arm-triangle choke. The team matchup was fairly even to begin with, as the first half ended with both teams registering 4 submission wins. Courtney Kaye was the driving force for the North with a rear-naked choke against Gabriela Kuliga and an armbar against Zoe Lundy, while Vanessa English caught Amy Derwanz with a Mir lock and Lana Campbell with the armbar to be the South’s key player. The North led 5-4 after the first half, but the second half was pure dominance by the South. English racked up 3 consecutive finishes to end the night as the most successful competitor on the mat, and the South won 11-5. Enyo Grappling 8 Full Results Josefine Modig defeats Frankie Renda via Submission – Arm-triangle Choke Caroline Kinnane defeats Silvia Scomparin via Submission – Bow and Arrow Choke North vs South Lana Campbell vs Zoe Lundy ends in a Draw – Double Elimination Layla Szymanska vs Madison Murphy ends in a Draw – Double Elimination Amy Derwanz defeats Molly Lindsay via Submission – Armbar Vanessa English defeats Amy Derwanz via Submission – Mir Lock Courtney Kaye defeats Gabriela Kuliga via Submission – Rear-naked Choke Hayley Carter defeats Dominika Krzeslak via Submission – Armbar Layla Szymanska defeats Hayley Carter via Submission – Ankle-lock Courtney Kaye defeats Zoe Lundy via Submission – Armbar Layla Szymanska vs Madison Murphy ends in a Draw – Double Elimination Vanessa English defeats Lana Campbell via Submission – Armbar Zoe Lundy defeats Dominika Krzeslak via Submission – Armbar Courtney Kaye vs Vanessa English ends in a Draw – Double Elimination North are leading South 5-4 after the first half! Layla Szymanska vs Gabriela Kuliga ends in a Draw – Double Elimination Hayley Carter defeats Dominika Krzeslak via Submission – Rear-naked Choke Vanessa English defeats Courtney Kaye via Submission – Kneebar Vanessa English defeats Hannah Garret via Submission – Aoki Lock Vanessa English defeats Lana Campbell via Submission – Armbar Zoe Lundy defeats Courtney Kaye via Submission – Rear-naked Choke Dominika Krzeslak vs Madison Murphy ends in a Draw – Double Elimination Lana Campbell vs Gabriela Kuliga ends in a Draw – Double Elimination Hannah Garret vs Hayley Carter ends in a Draw – Double Elimination South defeats North 11-5 to win Enyo 8! Preliminary Card Jess Hammond defeats Tiia Barkham via Submission – Bow and Arrow Choke Hafsa Hasan defeats Lele Nairne via Decision – Referee Decision Sophie Coombes defeats Cara Waller via Submission – Arm-triangle Choke Hayleigh Heather defeats Hayley Curtis via Submission – Heel Hook Becky Mayo defeats Danielle Lewis via Submission – Ezekiel Choke Callie Nelson defeats Abi King via Submission – Armbar Caitlin Roberts defeats Rhea Simpson via Submission – Ankle-lock Michelle Skuse defeats Ashlie Fowler via Submission – Kneebar Jessie Nelson defeats Frankie Horsman via Submission – Triangle Choke Beau Jefferies defeats Nia Purcell via Submission – Armbar Alexis Edwards defeats Madison Moore via Submission – Rear-naked Choke Juniors Aiyanna Williams defeats Anastasia Jikhvadze via Decision – Referee Decision Sofia Da Silva defeats Amber Whitston via Decision – Referee Decision Taya Jones defeats Mikaela Chudleigh via Decision – Referee Decision Serina Sharma defeats Hope Bretherton via Decision – Referee Decision Emelia Sutherland defeats Penny Seager-Davies via Submission – Armbar Poppy Williams defeats Megan Stacey via Decision – Referee Decision Bella Jochenko defeats Amara Eres Davies via Submission – Armbar Gabriella Taylor defeats Ellie Livingstone via Submission – Armbar The full Enyo Grappling 8: North vs South event replay, including all of the above results, is available to watch here.
